## [03:01 - 06:02]

money, but it's becoming and continues to become even more difficult. So if you can't make your Roas and you can't make profit on your first sale, what do you do? You work on lifetime value. This is something critical for an e-commerce business is lifetime value, because the cost to acquire one customer and the cost to retain a customer, it's just no argument. If you're selling a multi category and you know, your average selling price across your whole range is $50, then your AOV is basically that times quantity. So how many are they actually buying as part of that purchase? So they're the key things that you can influence. Average selling price is down to you.
